Predict football match outcomes using the W-5 Multi-Agent AI Consensus Framework, achieving high accuracy with a blend of AI and machine learning techniques.
Hyper-Converged Cloud Operating System enabling Intelligent, Scalable, and Autonomous Distributed Analytics through Machine Learning Integration Framework.
An Explainable Artificial Intelligence Framework for Student Depression Risk Prediction using Machine Learning, SHAP Explainability, Gemini-powered Reasoning, and Evidence-Based Recommendations.

Machine learning framework for estimating global Surface Water Fraction (SWF) from passive microwave brightness temperatures (WindSat/CIMR). Covers end-to-end data preprocessing, EDA, and a full regression pipeline including model selection, feature engineering, HPO, SHAP explainability, and error analysis.

An Explainable AI framework for automated analysis and priority classification of public grievances using NLP and Machine Learning. The system leverages TF-IDF, Random Forest, LIME, and Gemini API to classify grievances into priority levels, provide transparent explanations, and deliver real-time insights through an interactive Streamlit dashboard.
Machine Learning framework for Environmental Epidemiology (MLEE)
AI-driven NLP framework for detecting and classifying hate speech in social media using NLP preprocessing, machine learning, and transformer-based models.
A framework for motion planning using generative machine learning methods

Developed a machine learning framework for predicting atmospheric Precipitable Water (PW) using GNSS-derived Zenith Total Delay (ZTD), spatial coordinates, and temporal features. Implemented Random Forest, XGBoost, time-series forecasting, and spatial interpolation techniques for meteorological analysis.
Machine Learning Framework Integrating Protein Language Models for Virulence Prediction in Protozoan Parasites

A theoretical and empirical re-assessment of aleatoric uncertainty in machine learning. Introduces a formal framework that decomposes aleatoric uncertainty into measurable components and demonstrates that a substantial portion of traditionally irreducible uncertainty can be systematically reduced.
A unified framework for machine learning with time series
DeepGNN is a framework for training machine learning models on large scale graph data.
multiple machine learning and deep learning practice projects and framework practice repo

Repository containing Exploratory Data Analysis (EDA), Machine Learning, and Deep Learning projects. Includes data preprocessing, visualization, feature engineering, predictive modeling, and AI applications using Python and modern data science frameworks.
Apache Mahout is an open-source framework for building scalable machine learning applications.
A collection of AI/ML engineering projects covering deep learning, MLOps, LLM frameworks, RAG applications, scalable pipelines, FastAPIs, Docker and production-focused machine learning systems.

Framework for identifying, measuring, and documenting fairness risks in machine learning systems.

HydroGraph is an AI-powered framework for assessing pipe risk and maintenance priority in Ottawa's water infrastructure network using machine learning, engineering heuristics, and graph-based risk propagation.
An IoT-Based Machine Learning Framework for Intelligent Traffic Flow Prediction in Smart Cities using Linear Regression, Random Forest, XGBoost, and SHAP.

To design and implement a robust machine learning framework to forecast one-month-ahead stock volatility using historical price data, enhancing risk assessment capabilities and enabling data-driven portfolio diversification.
an open-sourced highly automated machine learning Python framework for data-driven geochemistry discovery
A Python Framework for Multi-Agent Programming with Machine Learning

A benchmark and research framework for uncertainty quantification in scientific machine learning and neural operators. Evaluates calibration, coverage, OOD detection, active learning, and long-horizon rollout reliability across FNOs, DeepONets, PINNs, and surrogate models.
An Explainable Machine Learning Framework for High-Scale Anomaly Detection in Imbalanced Data Systems.
Machine Learning based Fetal Health Prediction using Cardiotocography (CTG)

Real-time ML monitoring system detecting systemic failures across Data, Model, and API layers. Features a multi-agent architecture, synthetic drift engine (Z-score/KL Divergence), and adaptive thresholding to visualize and mitigate cascading risks in machine learning pipelines. Built with FastAPI, NumPy, and Chart.js.

FairXplain is a Trustworthy AI framework that makes machine learning decisions transparent and fair. It uses Explainable AI to show why predictions are made, audits models for hidden bias, applies fairness improvements, and generates counterfactual explanations. The system helps ensure AI decisions are understandable, accountable, and trustworthy.

A modular Python framework for fairness-aware post-processing in machine learning.  The library takes classifier probabilities and learns optimal decision thresholds  by optimizing multiple fairness and performance metrics, enabling multi-objective  selection via methods such as TOPSIS and Zenith.
Multi-Modal Machine Learning Framework for Social Media Addiction Risk Prediction Using Behavioural, Textual, and Demographic Data
MitoClipSplice: A Machine Learning Framework for Resolving Mitochondrial RNA Cleavage Sites from Strand-Specific RNA-Seq Soft-Clips
A translation-aware framework for alignment-free phylogenetics using machine learning

A production-grade test harness for evaluating machine learning model quality beyond accuracy metrics. This framework systematically detects ambiguous predictions, excessive model uncertainty, and prediction flakiness, critical indicators of model reliability in production systems.
Automation framework for machine learning, forecasting, model evaluation, and interpretation.
A machine learning framework for explainable web application vulnerability detection using an engineered XGBoost model integrated with SHAP-based feature interpretation and security analytics.

A multi-sensor machine learning framework for Boro rice mapping, district-level yield prediction, and irrigation advisory in Bangladesh using Sentinel-1, Sentinel-2, Landsat LST, CHIRPS rainfall, and BBS agricultural data.

This project highlights the potential of machine learning in enhancing drug safety evaluations and  provides a reproducible framework for toxicological screening. By leveraging molecular  descriptors and robust classification techniques, the approach contributes to advancements in  computational drug discovery and predictive toxicology.

A hybrid machine learning and LLM agent framework for weather-driven solar output prediction. Combines geospatial satellite data and Bureau of Meteorology weather records to generate daily solar yield estimates with calibrated confidence scores, accessible through a natural-language Q&A interface built on Claude Haiku 4.5 and FastAPI.
PTMLib (Pendragon Tools for Machine Learning) is a set of utilities for use with Machine Learning frameworks such as Scikit-Learn and TensorFlow.

A decentralized IoT + Machine Learning system for hyperlocal cloudburst/landslide risk prediction. ESP32 sensor nodes (soil moisture, rainfall, DHT11) transmit over LoRa and WiFi-UDP to a Flask server running a RandomForest classifier, with real-time MySQL logging, a live web dashboard, and Blynk/GSM/buzzer field alerts.

Amazon EMR is a cloud big data platform for running large-scale distributed data processing jobs, interactive SQL queries, and machine learning applications using open-source analytics frameworks such as Apache Spark, Apache Hive, Apache HBase, Apache Flink, Apache Hudi, and Presto.
A differentiable ray tracer using the PyTorch machine-learning framework in Python.
Unsupervised machine learning architecture using K-Means and Agglomerative Hierarchical Clustering to engineer distinct credit consumer archetypes and optimize channel specific marketing frameworks.

This Guidance demonstrates how to optimize real-time bidding decisions across multiple machine learning models by deploying GPU-accelerated NVIDIA model architectures that run in parallel within an ARTF-compliant framework.
An All-in-One Algo-Trading Framework: Backtest -> Train -> Trade -> Monitor. Machine / Deep Learning Ready. Supports All Trading: TradFi+CeFi+DeFi. Code Once, Trade Anywhere.

BioGuard-Eval: DNA Synthesis Screening & Adversarial Evals. Implements machine learning, and biological safety safeguards. Builds a simulation of DNA Synthesis Screening (filtering regulated biological threats) and an Adversarial Evaluation Framework, stress-testing filters against obfuscation attacks like codon optimization and sequence splitting.
A comprehensive ranking and evaluation framework for machine learning models and algorithms

Production-grade ML pipeline & Streamlit dashboard solving subscriber attrition. Built on a decoupled Python framework, it resolves extreme class imbalance using scikit-learn. Benchmarks 6 optimized models (XGBoost, RF, SVM) via a live inference engine to convert variables into real-time risk probabilities & client retention strategies.
A high-level orchestration and pipeline framework for quantum machine learning

Hybrid Explainable AI framework for diabetes prediction combining ensemble machine learning, fuzzy logic, SHAP, and LIME. Delivers accurate risk assessment with transparent, human-interpretable explanations to support clinical decision-making and improve trust in healthcare AI systems.

An enterprise machine learning pipeline and predictive engine designed to mitigate hotel booking cancellations, eliminate revenue leaks, and optimize inventory allocation using advanced ensemble modeling and operational risk-weighted frameworks.
Ignite your local AI projects with Ignis, a tool designed for seamless implementation and efficient management of machine learning models.
Enterprise-Scale ModelNexus Empowers Predictive Analytics with Intelligent, Scalable, and Autonomous Machine Learning Model Training Architecture Framework.
Keep track of the newest machine learning frameworks on GitHub

A hybrid machine learning framework for vehicle-specific accident risk prediction, combining historical and real-time environmental data to generate intelligent alerts for safer navigation in mountainous and high-risk road conditions.
Demonstrates project planning for a predictive maintenance machine learning initiative using the PACE framework, including milestones, deliverables, and stakeholder-focused planning.
Machine Learning-driven Digital Twin framework for traffic prediction and mitigation in metro construction zones using SUMO simulation, XGBoost, Random Forest, LSTM, and GRU.
An evaluation framework for machine learning models simulating high-throughput materials discovery.
A Non-Intrusive Diagnostic Framework for Evaluating Scientific Claims in Quantum Machine Learning
Personal AI framework for studying Data Science, Machine Learning, AI and MLOps.
This is the code for a lag-informed machine-learning RVF transmission suitability framework across Uganda spanning 2013-2024.
This repo comprises a spatially-aware machine learning model framework

This project presents an Explainable Artificial Intelligence (XAI) framework for predicting the survival status of liver cirrhosis patients using machine learning techniques. The model analyzes clinical and biochemical parameters to classify patients into different survival categories and provides interpretable explanations using SHAP and LIME.
A modular machine learning framework for budget execution & data analysis built in Python with Scikit, XGBoost, PyTorch, and TensorFlow.

Built the Metamorphosis Development Index, a PCA-based framework for measuring multidimensional development across 170+ countries using World Bank indicators. Developed predictive models using machine learning/NLP techniques to forecast future development scores and created an interactive Streamlit dashboard for visualizations and predictions
Developed a machine learning model using the XGBoost framework to analyze customer behavior metrics and accurately evaluate account retention risks.

Plataforma Enterprise de SOC - SIEM em tempo real, automao SOAR, framework MITRE ATT&CK, deteco de anomalias com Machine Learning (TensorFlow), dashboard profissional e WebSocket. Desenvolvido em Rust para mxima performance.

Explainable AI for Black-Box Credit Scoring: A SHAP-Based Transparency, Fairness, and Interpretability Framework that enhances trust in machine learning credit risk predictions through feature attribution, bias detection, fairness evaluation, and model explainability.

This repository provides data and Python code for machine learningbased optimization of L-DOPA extraction from Vicia faba. It uses CART and ensemble models to identify high-yield conditions, offering an interpretable decision-support framework for scalable and industrial extraction processes.
Equitrain: A Unified Framework for Training and Fine-tuning Machine Learning Interatomic Potentials
A Python and machine learning model based automated scientific computational framework for surrogate model assisted FEA design and optimisation of electric motor winding geometries

Machine learning framework for predicting Largest Contentful Paint (LCP) using Lighthouse metrics. Features SAFE leakage-aware feature selection, XGBoost-based prediction, SHAP explainability, Core Web Vitals classification, and actionable web performance optimization recommendations.

This project re-estimates residential real estate prices in Ames, Iowa using advanced data preprocessing, feature engineering, and regularized machine learning . It applies Ridge, Lasso, and Elastic Net regression models within the R tidymodels framework to optimize price estimation accuracy, interpretability, and generalizability.
Machine Learning framework for EMIR audio classification using MFCC, Chroma, Spectral Features, SVM, Random Forest, XGBoost, and SHAP-based explainability.

Machine learning framework to predict Autism Spectrum Disorder(ASD) in adults using the UCI dataset.Worked on data preprocessing,exploratory data analysis,training multiple models to identify key predictive features.A web application was developed with Flask to demonstrate practical deployment of the system for accessible autism screening.

An end-to-end industrial machine learning framework that predicts shipment delays using the DataCo Smart Supply Chain Dataset. It processes 180k records, implements rigorous leakage auditing, and features a nine-model tournament where a baseline Decision Tree achieved a 91.5% F1-score. Includes a Streamlit batch prediction app.

Computational framework for modelling phonological dyslexia using psycholinguistic feature engineering, PCA-based lexical analysis, graphemephoneme desynchronization modelling, Graph Neural Networks, and machine learning.
Implementation of gradient descent optimization algorithm without machine learning frameworks.
Machine learning framework for predicting and optimizing sintering additives in SiN ceramics based on compositionprocessingproperty data.

FinTwin is a research framework and benchmark suite for synthetic financial market simulation, portfolio optimization, systemic risk analysis, and explainable AI. It enables reproducible machine learning research using privacy-preserving financial digital twins.
Autoware-ML is a machine learning framework for multiple tasks, supporting the full lifecycle - training, evaluation, optimization, and deployment of models with native runtime support in Autoware.
Framework genrico de Machine Learning para clasificacin binaria

This machine learning project implements a Linear Regression model to analyze AI industry trends. By evaluating historical data across fifty records with structural accuracy, it maps the direct correlation between professional experience and salary packages. The system establishes a perfect zero-error predictive framework for market forecasting.
dgbpy is a framework for research and deployment of machine learning models from seismic and well data.

brpc is an Industrial-grade RPC framework using C++ Language, which is often used in high performance system such as Search, Storage, Machine learning, Advertisement, Recommendation etc. "brpc" means "better RPC".

mercury-explainability is a library with implementations of different state-of-the-art methods in the field of explainability. They are designed to work efficiently and to be easily integrated with the main Machine Learning frameworks.
This repository contains the research and implementation for a master's thesis proposing an efficient malware detection framework designed for resource-constrained environments.
Designing an Educational Framework to Facilitate Educational Access for Women Using Machine Learning

A comprehensive and extensible ontology for systematically modeling fairness notions, metrics, biases, evaluation methods, and scientific provenance in machine learning. This ontology provides researchers, developers, and practitioners with a unified, machine-readable framework to guide the design and assessment of fair ML systems.
A Machine Learning Framework for QR Code Phishing and  Malicious Link Detection
AI-Assisted ASIC Design Space Exploration Framework using Machine Learning and Industrial EDA Tools

A non-invasive AI framework using CNNs to identify early signs of substance abuse from visual cues. The system analyzes facial expressions and classifies images into 'Addicted' or 'Not Addicted' based on emotional distress patterns. Optimized with data augmentation and deep learning for scalable, real-world deployment.
